refactorings_applied: No refactoring needed - code is clean and well-structured
review_notes: Copy button implementation follows existing FileViewer.tsx pattern (ClipboardCopy/Check icons, 2s revert, silent failure)
Implementation improves on FileViewer.tsx by using useRef for timer cleanup on unmount (prevents potential memory leaks)
useCallback with correct dependency arrays for handleCopyPath and handleCopyRepoPath
Accessibility attributes (aria-label, title, type=button) are properly set
Test file covers 10 cases including edge cases: rapid clicks, unmount cleanup, error handling
Two similar copy handlers exist but extracting a shared component is YAGNI for 2 instances
Pre-existing test failure in git-utils.test.ts is unrelated to Issue #552
summary: Code review complete. No refactoring needed. The copy-to-clipboard implementation is clean, consistent with existing patterns (FileViewer.tsx), and actually improves upon them with proper timer cleanup via useRef. All 10 tests pass, ESLint 0 errors, TypeScript 0 errors.
